name: quantumyog
description: 1StopQuantum local learning, circuit simulation, and benchmark intelligence platform.

scripts.build: node --check scripts/dev-server.js && node --check scripts/sumi-framework-cli.js && node --check public/sumi-voice-sdk.js && node --check public/sumi-framework.js && node --check public/sumi-ui-actions.js && node --check public/sumi-mic-worklet.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/monaco-worker.js && esbuild public/tutorial-viz.js --bundle --format=iife --global-name=QuantumYogTutorialViz --outfile=public/tutorial-viz.bundle.js
